D1 Optics L4 Analyze Reference

Barrel & Pincushion Distortion

warp a square grid as magnification changes with distance from the axis

When magnification varies with how far a point is off-axis, straight lines bow. Outward bowing is barrel; inward pinching is pincushion; a mix gives a moustache profile.

Adjust the primary and secondary radial coefficients. The faint grid is the undistorted scene; the crimson grid is the distorted image. The readout names the distortion type.
